product_updates.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
product_updates.content: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

product_updates.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
product_updates.content: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?
